meta.title: CommandCenter — Restaurant Intelligence for Swedish Restaurants
meta.description: AI-powered business intelligence for Swedish restaurant groups. Bring every system your business runs on into one place, and let AI make sense of the numbers so you can see what really matters.

hero.subhead: Every system your business runs on, in one place — with AI that reads the numbers, explains what's changing, and helps you see what really matters.

features.headline: Everything a restaurant owner needs to know

card1.title: Staff costs, down to the hour
card1.desc: See actual hours worked, OB supplements, lateness, and cost per department. Connected directly to Personalkollen — no manual export needed.

card2.title: Revenue and covers, daily
card2.desc: Track daily revenue, covers, food/drink split, and average spend per guest. Spot which days and services are your most profitable.

card3.title: AI assistant on every page
card3.desc: Ask questions in plain English: "Why is my margin down this month?" or "Which staff member had the most overtime?" — Claude answers based on your actual data.

card4.title: Automated anomaly alerts
card4.desc: Nightly analysis detects unusual spikes in costs or drops in revenue and emails you before the day starts. No need to stare at dashboards.

card5.title: P&L tracker and forecast
card5.desc: Monthly profit & loss with manual entry for costs not yet in Fortnox. Revenue forecasts calibrated monthly to your actual patterns.

card6.title: Weekly scheduling insights
card6.desc: Group plan customers get a weekly AI-generated staff optimisation report — identifying overstaffed shifts and scheduling inefficiencies.

integrations.headline: Your data, automatically.
integrations.subhead: Connect your systems once. CommandCenter syncs every morning at 06:00 — no exports, no copy-paste, no spreadsheets.

pricing.headline: Pay from day one. Priced per restaurant.
pricing.subhead: Swedish operators don't buy toys. CommandCenter replaces a chunk of what a fractional CFO would charge you for — and it works while you sleep.

founding.title: 995 kr / month — locked for 24 months
founding.body: Full Solo tier + most of Group for the first 10 restaurants to sign on. In exchange: monthly feedback, case-study partnership, and a direct line to the team. Converts to 1,495 kr/mo permanent discount after 24 months.
founding.footnote: No free trial. Paid from day one.

pricing.annualNote: Annual billing saves ~17% (2 months free). Invoicing available — standard for Swedish B2B.

finalCta.headline: Ready to see what's really going on in your restaurants?
finalCta.subhead: 10 founding spots at 995 kr/mo, locked for 24 months. Setup takes under 5 minutes. Cancel any time.

footer.tagline: AI-powered business intelligence for Swedish restaurant groups. Built in Sweden.
